summary: Completed the auction UI plan: AuctionCountdownPanel with luxe gold-on-dark styling integrated on auctions/[id] and auction-room/[id] (UPCOMING + live); AuctionResultBanner refactored with variant=luxe default and inline winner payment block aligned to same palette; ChatMessageList uses fixed hex bubbles (gold me, cream incoming); SupportChatPanel shared by /messages and /staff/support; PortalSwitcherGate restricts Admin Quick Access hub to isAdmin users via layout.tsx; globals.css luxe-page text-primary overrides added. npm run build succeeded with no TypeScript errors.
